profile_source.source: Profile-backed residual bead from the post-QR microkernel reprofile; QR1024 remained the top fj-lax linalg row and the bead required a flat Householder reflector arena lever.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf27-baseline2 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf27-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

lever.description: Replace Vec<Vec<f64>> Householder reflector storage with one preallocated flat Vec<f64> arena plus reflector offsets.

behavior_proof.unit_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr_ -- --nocapture: 10 passed; 0 failed; 1120 filtered
behavior_proof.conformance_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle qr -- --nocapture: 8 passed; 0 failed; 48 filtered
isomorphism: QR has no RNG surface and no tie-breaking surface.
Candidate source was reverted after the failed keep gate.

formatting.cargo_fmt_package_check: cargo fmt -p fj-lax -- --check failed on pre-existing formatting drift across fj-lax files outside this rejected source hunk

next_deeper_primitive.name: Dedicated QR rank-k panel-update microkernel with behavior-contract bead for blocked WY or communication-avoiding QR
next_deeper_primitive.proof_obligation: Establish JAX-tolerance parity contract before changing floating-point association; preserve dtype, shape, sign-normalization, and error behavior; golden digest or conformance oracle evidence required.
